# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 10000 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.http.router
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
          dynamic_stats: false
      - name: envoy.filters.http.ext_authz
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.ext_authz.v3.ExtAuthz
          grpc_service:
            envoy_grpc:
              cluster_name: authz_cluster
            timeout: 1s
          failure_mode_allow: false
      - name: envoy.filters.http.ratelimit
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.ratelimit.v3.RateLimit
          domain: service
          timeout: 100ms
          rate_limit_service:
            grpc_service:
              envoy_grpc:
                cluster_name: ratelimit_cluster
            timeout: 100ms
      - name: envoy.filters.http.cors
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.cors.v3.Cors
          allow_origin_string_match:
          - prefix: "*"
          allow_methods: GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS
          allow_headers: x-requested-with,content-type,accept,authorization
          expose_headers: "*"
          max_age: 86400
          allow_credentials: false
  clusters:
  - name: service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address: { address: service, port_value: 80 }
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 10000
        max_pending_requests: 10000
        max_requests: 10000
        max_retries: 3
    retry_policy:
      retry_back_off:
        base_interval: 25ms
        max_interval: 250ms
      num_retries: 3
      retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream"
      per_try_timeout: 5s
    http2_protocol_options:
      max_concurrent_streams: 100
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
        keepalive_probes: 3
        keepalive_interval: 30
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        service_name: service
    outlier_detection:
      consecutive_5xx: 5
      interval: 10s
      base_ejection_time: 30s
      max_ejection_percent: 20
